name: mikser-io-better-stack
description: Better Stack (uptime + log management) integration for mikser-io. Single plugin call wires both surfaces: pino log transport via @logtail/pino (logs ship to Better Stack's log ingestion) and a periodic heartbeat ping (so Better Stack Uptime knows the mikser process is alive). Uses the engine's addLogTransport substrate landed in mikser-io 9.x.
